expected_failure_modes: Agent may learn to hover just above the pad to reduce dense penalty without triggering terminal event, relying on episode timeout to force landing.
If velocity thresholds in success condition are too strict, the agent might never trigger the terminal reward and achieve only mediocre cumulative returns.
risk_notes: Scaling coefficients (0.1, 0.3, 0.03, thresholds 0.2, 0.1) are initial guesses and may need recalibration for the actual environment observation ranges.
The crash event relies on y <= 0, assuming body-ground contact always indicates a crash; if the environment has a soft touchdown mechanism that momentarily sets y<0, false negatives could occur.
